THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATAMOROS, MARIANO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONTIVEROS, HECTOR RODRIGUEZ, GUSTAVO $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,025.00, CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AGAINST DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ,GUSTAVO.
